nodes.label: Fuse (Apex Legend)
nodes.visual_notes: Male character with mohawk hairstyle and thick mustache. Wears a leather jacket over a white t-shirt with a skull belt buckle. Has a prominent gold mechanical/prosthetic left arm with ammunition bandoliers across chest. Right arm wears a red fingerless glove. Carries a firearm over shoulder. Lower legs feature green-tipped grenades/explosives attached to armor. Color palette: gold, dark red/maroon, grey, white. Role indicators: explosive ordinance specialist, offensive legend.
